plugins.name: commit-craft
plugins.one_liner: Drafts conventional commits from the staged diff and guards message format at commit time.

plugins.name: env-doctor
plugins.one_liner: Checks the toolchain against the project's declared versions at session start and warns early.

plugins.name: fork-a-foundry
plugins.one_liner: One skill that bootstraps your own self-running plugin workshop — the factory, shipping itself.

plugins.name: night-clerk
plugins.one_liner: Ask Claude Code what plugin helps with X - the clerk searches the foundry catalog and hands you the install line.

plugins.name: plugin-smith
plugins.one_liner: Scaffolds new Claude Code plugins and health-checks existing ones against the official spec.

plugins.name: pr-narrator
plugins.one_liner: A subagent that turns a branch's commits and diff into a reviewer-ready PR description.

plugins.name: session-recap
plugins.one_liner: Writes a structured recap when a session ends and recalls it when the next one starts.

plugins.name: test-gap-nudge
plugins.one_liner: A polite Stop-hook that notices source changes with no matching test changes and says so once.

kits.name: Plugin-maker kit
kits.desc: Everything for building Claude Code plugins the disciplined way — scaffold, audit, and eventually your own factory.

kits.name: Git-flow kit
kits.desc: Clean commits in, clean pull requests out — the disciplined git loop.

kits.name: Solo dev kit
kits.desc: Run a healthy one-person repo: diagnose your environment, get nudged when code ships without tests, end every session with a written handoff.
